The '''''Fearless''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] commanded by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gett]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] served aboard the ''Fearless'' briefly in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], she helped to evacuate the besieged [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]] from [[Dinlo]] and rescue [[Omega Squad]].<ref name="Triple Zero" />

{{Ship-stub}}
